2.label: CO Alarm
2.description: Devices in this group will be switched on or off when the CO alarm status changes (uses Basic command class).

3.label: CO Alarm (Notifications)
3.description: Devices in this group will receive notifications when the CO alarm status changes. Useful for devices that can trigger alarms.

4.label: CO Level
4.description: Devices in this group will be switched on or off after exceeding the CO concentration level specified in parameter 14.

5.label: Tamper Alarm
5.description: Devices in this group will receive notifications when tampering is detected or cancelled.

6.label: CO Alarm BC
6.description: Devices in this group will receive Sensor Alarm reports when the CO alarm status changes. Provides backward compatibility with controllers not supporting Z-Wave+.

7.label: Tamper Alarm BC
7.description: Devices in this group will receive Sensor Alarm reports when tampering is detected or cancelled. Provides backward compatibility with controllers not supporting Z-Wave+.

paramInformation.label: Visual Indicator Notifications: Exceeding Temperature Threshold
Visual Indicator Notifications: Lack of Z-Wave Range
Sound Notifications: Lack of Z-Wave Range
Send Secure Commands to 7th Association Group
Commands Sent to 2nd Association Group (CO Alarm)
paramInformation.description: Values of specified commands may be set in parameters 11 and 12.

paramInformation.label: Group 2: BASIC ON Command Value
paramInformation.description: Value of BASIC ON command sent to devices in 2nd association group after the CO Alarm activation.

paramInformation.label: Group 2: BASIC OFF Command Value
paramInformation.description: Value of BASIC OFF command sent to devices in 2nd association group after the CO Alarm cancellation.

paramInformation.label: Commands Sent to 4th Association Group (CO Level)
paramInformation.description: Values of specified commands may be set in parameters 16 and 19.

paramInformation.label: Group 4: CO Level for Sending BASIC ON
paramInformation.description: Minimum level of CO concentration which exceeding will result in starting the timer set in parameter 15. Must be at least 4 ppm higher than parameter 17.

paramInformation.label: Group 4: Time Required for Sending BASIC ON
paramInformation.description: Time during which the level of CO concentration should remain above the value set in parameter 14 to send the BASIC ON command.

paramInformation.label: Group 4: BASIC ON Command Value
paramInformation.description: Value of BASIC ON command sent to devices in 4th association group after exceeding the CO level set in parameter 14 through the time set in parameter 15.

paramInformation.label: Group 4: CO Level for Sending BASIC OFF
paramInformation.description: Level of CO concentration below which falling will result in sending the BASIC OFF command. Must be at least 4 ppm lower than parameter 14.

paramInformation.label: Group 4: BASIC OFF Command Value
paramInformation.description: Value of BASIC OFF command sent to devices in 4th association group after falling below the CO level set in parameter 17.

paramInformation.label: Temperature Report Interval
paramInformation.description: Time interval between consecutive reports of temperature. Short time interval means more frequent communication, which results in shortened battery life.

paramInformation.label: Temperature Report Hysteresis
paramInformation.description: Minimum change in temperature resulting in a report being sent to the main Z-Wave controller.

paramInformation.label: Temperature Threshold
paramInformation.description: Temperature level which exceeding will result in sending actions set in parameters 2, 3 and 4.

paramInformation.label: Send CO Concentration Reports
paramInformation.description: Activates reporting the value of CO concentration level to the main Z-Wave controller.

paramInformation.label: CO Level Report Hysteresis
paramInformation.description: Minimum change in CO concentration level which results in sending a new value to the main Z-Wave controller.

paramInformation.label: CO Level Reporting Threshold
paramInformation.description: CO concentration level which exceeding will result in sending a new value to the main Z-Wave controller, according to parameter 25 settings.

metadata.inclusion: Quickly, triple click the button located on the casing.
metadata.exclusion: Quickly, triple click the button located on the casing.
metadata.reset:
1. Press and hold the button.
2. Release the button when the LED indicator glows white and a short beep sounds.
3. Click the button when the LED indicator glows yellow.
4. After a few seconds, a red LED indicator and a long beep confirm the reset.
